title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for robotics. Vera provides a CPU layer for AI agents. Isaac GR00T is a humanoid robot reference platform. Together they form NVIDIA's integrated stack for physical AI systems that perceive and act in the real world.
